attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
2 as Batch_id,
ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID 
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ITEM_ID
,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ITEM_NAME,CHR(10),''),CHR(13),'')) ITEM_NAME
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ITEM_TYPE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ERP_SPECIFIC
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.HTS_CODE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.START_DATE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.END_DATE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.RULE_ID
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.CREATED_BY
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.CREATED_DATE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.MODIFIED_BY
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.MODIFIED_DATE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.END_DATED_FLAG
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.HTS_START_DATE
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ITEM_FLAG
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
,ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM 
CUBE.XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSIFICATION  ITEM_CLASSIFICATION
WHERE  ITEM_CLASSIFICATION.MODIFIED_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
1 as Batch_id,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_HISTORY_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ITEM_ID,
TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ITEM_NAME,CHR(10),''),CHR(13),'')) ITEM_NAME,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ITEM_TYPE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ERP_SPECIFIC,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.HTS_CODE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.START_DATE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.END_DATE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.COUNTRY_GROUP_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.RULE_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.TC_INTERFACE_FLAG,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.CREATED_BY,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.CREATED_DATE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.MODIFIED_BY,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.MODIFIED_DATE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.END_DATED_FLAG,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.NEXTLINX_RULE_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.HTS_START_DATE,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ITEM_FLAG,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM
CUBE.XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY
WHERE  ITEM_CLSFY_HISTORY.MODIFIED_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
